name: GAF_SyteLine_SetuprgidUpdate_Tool_v1
description: Set the setup resource group and scheduling driver on routing operations in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /update/SLJrtSchs
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Content-Type: application/json
Body:
Batch update multiple operations in one call:
{
  "IDOName": "SLJrtSchs",
  "RefreshAfterSave": true,
  "Changes": [
    {
      "Action": 2,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Setuprgid", "Value": "FA-400-LRG"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "SchedDrv", "Value": "L"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Job", "Value": "     90001"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "10"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "_ItemId", "Value": "PBT=[SLJrtSchs]..."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "Action": 2,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Setuprgid", "Value": "INS-20-LRG"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "SchedDrv", "Value": "L"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Job", "Value": "     90001"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "20"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "_ItemId", "Value": "PBT=[SLJrtSchs]..."}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
CRITICAL: SchedDrv MUST match resource group type:
- LRG resource groups (Labor type) -> SchedDrv = 'L'
- MRG resource groups (Machine type) -> SchedDrv = 'M'
Mismatch causes UI warning: 'Sched Driver was X now is Y'.
Action 2 = update. Key fields (Job, Suffix, OperNum) MUST be included as non-modified.
_ItemId from the JrtSchs Load tool MUST be included as non-modified.
Job number must be left-padded with spaces to 10 chars.
Batch: include ALL operations for a job in one Changes array.
CRITICAL: You MUST first use the JrtSchs Load tool to get the _ItemId for each operation. Without _ItemId, the update will fail.
Example Request:
Set resource groups for job 90001, operations 10 and 20 (batch):
POST /update/SLJrtSchs with Changes array containing one entry per operation, each with _ItemId from the Load tool.
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object indicating success or failure.
Key Response Fields:
- Success: Boolean indicating if update succeeded
- Message: Error message if Success is false
- Items: Array with updated records showing new Setuprgid and SchedDrv values
After successful update, Setuprgid appears as JshSetuprgid in SLJobRoutes queries.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Update Setuprgid and SchedDrv on SLJrtSchs records (POST only).
Requires _ItemId from the JrtSchs Load tool — call that FIRST.
SchedDrv MUST match RG type: LRG -> 'L', MRG -> 'M'.
Batch: ALL operations in one Changes array.
Key fields (Job, Suffix, OperNum, _ItemId) as non-modified.

SITE: <site> placeholder = [TENANT]_DALS from agent input.
